keyFormat: <transitPlanet>.<aspect>.<natalPoint>.<natalSign> — the runtime comboKey on API aspect hits extends this with .h<natalHouse>.<transitSign>.h<transitHouse> where applicable (house segments are h-prefixed; segments are omitted when not computable, e.g. no natal cusps).

transitPlanets.name: moon
transitPlanets.nature: emotional nature, inner life, subconscious rhythms

transitPlanets.name: venus
transitPlanets.nature: love, values, aesthetics, relating and attraction

transitPlanets.name: mars
transitPlanets.nature: drive, assertion, sexuality, how you take action

transitPlanets.name: saturn
transitPlanets.nature: structure, responsibility, limitation, mastery through discipline

transitPlanets.name: chiron
transitPlanets.nature: the wound and the wisdom that grows from tending it

transitPlanets.name: pluto
transitPlanets.nature: deep transformation, power, death and rebirth, the unavoidable

transitPlanets.name: true_node
transitPlanets.nature: karmic direction, the growth path, evolutionary purpose

transitPlanets.name: south_node
transitPlanets.nature: past patterns, karmic inheritance, familiar gifts to release

natalPoints.name: moon
natalPoints.nature: emotional nature, inner life, subconscious rhythms

natalPoints.name: venus
natalPoints.nature: love, values, aesthetics, relating and attraction

natalPoints.name: mars
natalPoints.nature: drive, assertion, sexuality, how you take action

natalPoints.name: saturn
natalPoints.nature: structure, responsibility, limitation, mastery through discipline

natalPoints.name: pluto
natalPoints.nature: deep transformation, power, death and rebirth, the unavoidable

natalPoints.name: true_node
natalPoints.nature: karmic direction, the growth path, evolutionary purpose

natalPoints.name: chiron
natalPoints.nature: the wound and the wisdom that grows from tending it

natalPoints.name: south_node
natalPoints.nature: past patterns, karmic inheritance, familiar gifts to release

natalPoints.name: ic
natalPoints.nature: roots, home, ancestral foundation, private self

natalPoints.name: dsc
natalPoints.nature: partnership, the other, what you project onto relationships

natalPoints.name: vertex
natalPoints.nature: fated encounters, destined turning points through others

natalPoints.name: part_of_fortune
natalPoints.nature: material well-being, where joy and flow are found

aspects.name: conjunction
aspects.nature: fusion, merging, intensification of the natal theme

aspects.name: sextile
aspects.nature: opportunity, gentle flow, invitation to act

aspects.name: quincunx
aspects.nature: awkward integration, adjustment required, blind spot

aspects.name: opposition
aspects.nature: polarization, mirror through the other, confrontation

signs.name: Scorpio
signs.nature: depth, intimacy, power, willingness to transform

signs.name: Pisces
signs.nature: surrender, mystical connection, dissolution of self
